arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Fulham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United welcome Fulham to Old Trafford this afternoon in the fifth round of the FA Cup. In the previous round, the Red Devils knocked out Leicester City courtesy of a stoppage-time header from Harry Maguire. Patrick Dorgu is banned for today’s tie after he was shown a straight red card against Ipswich in midweek. arts.ttl: Arsenal HIJACK Man Utd offer for Nigerian superstar
arts.sum: Osimhen joined Galatasaray last summer on loan for the season from Napoli until June 2025. However, top Turkish journalist Yağız Sabuncuoğlu now reports that Arsenal are hijacking Man Utd's move for Osimhen.
